title: Paper Thin Maps
description: Makes maps in item frames flat like paper.
body:
![Paper Thin Maps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f24663e644c6c77728c18d2d17e1298d45c3cbac.png) --- --- # Paper Thin Maps (Visual Utility) This utility mod redefines how maps are displayed in Item Frames, making them ultra-thin and perfectly aligned with the block surface. It’s the ultimate tool for builders who want seamless "wallpaper" maps or clean glass displays. ## Key Features: - **Ultra-Thin Rendering:** Reduces the map thickness to a paper-like scale, removing the bulky 3D box effect. - **Zero-Gap Alignment:** Adjusts the map position to sit flush against the block (including Glass), eliminating the annoying "floating" space. - **Auto-Invisible Frames:** Automatically hides the wooden Item Frame texture when a map is placed inside. - **Marker Cleanup:** Completely disables the green "Frame Markers" on maps for a cleaner, marker-free world view. > This is a client-side and server-side compatible modification. It requires **Architectury API** to function. ## Compatibility: - **Loaders:** Supports both **Forge** and **Fabric**. - **Environments:** Perfect for creative building, map art galleries, and modern interior design.
Before After
